message:
Running command: # Start a background monitor that writes status every minute to a file
# This doesn't need to stay attached
cat > /tmp/monitor_wrapper.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
SYNTH_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/02-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
MAIN_LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/wrapper_run.log"
STATUS="/tmp/wrapper_monitor.log"
echo "Monitor started at $(date)" > "$STATUS"
for i in $(seq 1 1440); do
  sleep 60
  LINES=$(wc -l < "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  YTAIL=$(tail -1 "$SYNTH_LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs 2>/dev/null)
  ML=$(wc -l < "$MAIN_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LR=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR:-DONE} step=$STEP synth=$LINES main=$ML | $YTAIL" >> "$STATUS"
  if [ -z "$LR" ]; then
    echo "LIBRELANE_COMPLETE at $(date)" >> "$STATUS"
    # Copy final result
    tail -60 "$MAIN_LOG" >> "$STATUS"
    break
  fi
done
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/monitor_wrapper.sh
nohup /tmp/monitor_wrapper.sh > /dev/null 2>&1 &
MONITOR_PID=$!
echo "Background monitor started with PID $MONITOR_PID"
echo "Check /tmp/wrapper_monitor.log for progress"

  if [ -z "$LR" ]; then
